chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI CP D 2974 of 2021 ____________________________________________________________ DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE ____________________________________________________________ 1. For orders on office objections No.18 and 31 2. For hearing of CMA No.12816/2021 3. For hearing of main case 04.03.2025 Mr. Shahroze Sattar, advocate for the petitioner Mr. Muhammad Aizaz Ahmed, advocate for respondent Mr. Kashif Nazir, Assistant Attorney General This petition is pending since 2021 and has assailed a final notice issued by the Cantonment Board Clifton for payment of outstanding dues. No justification is articulated as to why this matter was agitated directly in writ jurisdiction. While the petitioner remains at liberty to respond to the notice, no case is made out for direct recourse to writ jurisdiction. Petition found to be misconceived is dismissed. Judge Judge Amjad
